english: It snowed again after two weeks without snow.

target: Sigo pensando que fue una buena decisión.
english: I still think it was a good decision.
grammar: Seguir + gerund = to keep/continue doing something.

target: Anda diciendo por ahí que va a renunciar.
english: He's going around saying he's going to resign.

target: Llevan viviendo en esa casa más de veinte años.
english: They've been living in that house for more than twenty years.

target: Acabo de enterarme de que cerraron la tienda.
english: I just found out they closed the store.

target: El bebé se puso a llorar a mitad de la noche.
english: The baby started crying in the middle of the night.

target: Dejaron de fabricar ese modelo hace años.
english: They stopped manufacturing that model years ago.

target: Volveremos a intentarlo mañana con más calma.
english: We'll try again tomorrow more calmly.

target: Sigue trabajando en la misma empresa desde que era joven.
english: He's still working at the same company since he was young.

target: Llevo toda la semana sin dormir bien.
english: I've gone the whole week without sleeping well.

target: Acaban de anunciar que el vuelo está retrasado.
english: They just announced that the flight is delayed.

target: Cuando vio el resultado, se puso a saltar de alegría.
english: When he saw the result, he started jumping for joy.

target: No dejo de pensar en lo que me dijiste.
english: I can't stop thinking about what you told me.

target: Han vuelto a subir los precios de la gasolina.
english: Gas prices have gone up again.

target: Seguimos esperando una respuesta del banco.
english: We're still waiting for a response from the bank.

target: Llevo meses intentando aprender a tocar la guitarra.
english: I've been trying to learn to play the guitar for months.

target: Acababa de sentarme cuando sonó el teléfono.
english: I had just sat down when the phone rang.

target: Se pusieron a discutir en medio del restaurante.
english: They started arguing in the middle of the restaurant.

target: Está a punto de empezar la película.
english: The movie is about to start.
grammar: Estar a punto de + infinitive = to be about to do something.

target: No deja de hablar ni un segundo.
english: He doesn't stop talking for even a second.

target: Vuelvo a repetir: es muy importante que lleguen a tiempo.
english: I repeat again: it's very important that they arrive on time.

target: Sigue nevando; no podremos salir hoy.
english: It keeps snowing; we won't be able to go out today.

target: Anda preocupado por los resultados del examen.
english: He's been worried about the exam results.

target: Llevo un rato intentando llamarte.
english: I've been trying to call you for a while.

target: Acabo de hablar con el médico y todo está bien.
english: I just spoke with the doctor and everything is fine.

target: El niño se puso a correr en cuanto vio el parque.
english: The child started running as soon as he saw the park.

target: Dejamos de vernos cuando ella se mudó al extranjero.
english: We stopped seeing each other when she moved abroad.

target: Si vuelves a llegar tarde, tendremos un problema.
english: If you're late again, we'll have a problem.

target: Lleva toda la vida dedicándose a la enseñanza.
english: He has spent his whole life dedicated to teaching.

target: Estaba a punto de salir cuando empezó a llover.
english: I was about to leave when it started raining.

target: Seguiremos luchando hasta conseguir nuestro objetivo.
english: We'll keep fighting until we achieve our goal.

target: Andan diciendo que van a cerrar la fábrica.
english: They're going around saying they're going to close the factory.

target: Llevo sin comer desde esta mañana.
english: I haven't eaten since this morning.

target: Acabó de leer el libro y me lo prestó.
english: He finished reading the book and lent it to me.

target: De repente se puso a cantar en medio de la calle.
english: Suddenly he started singing in the middle of the street.

target: No dejes de practicar o perderás lo aprendido.
english: Don't stop practicing or you'll lose what you've learned.

target: Hemos vuelto a cometer el mismo error.
english: We've made the same mistake again.

target: El perro sigue ladrando aunque ya no hay nadie.
english: The dog keeps barking even though there's nobody there.

target: Llevamos horas conduciendo sin parar.
english: We've been driving for hours without stopping.

target: Dijo que vendría a las ocho.
english: He said he would come at eight.
grammar: Direct → indirect: 'vendré' becomes 'vendría' (tense backshift).

target: Me preguntó si quería ir al cine.
english: He asked me if I wanted to go to the movies.

target: Le dije que no podía ir porque tenía trabajo.
english: I told him I couldn't go because I had work.

target: Nos contó que había vivido en Japón durante tres años.
english: He told us he had lived in Japan for three years.
grammar: Vivió → había vivido (preterite backshifts to pluperfect).

target: Según él, el proyecto estaría listo para el viernes.
english: According to him, the project would be ready by Friday.

target: Le explicó que no había podido terminar a tiempo.
english: He explained to her that he hadn't been able to finish on time.

target: Me aseguró que todo estaba bajo control.
english: He assured me that everything was under control.

target: Preguntó cuándo habíamos llegado.
english: He asked when we had arrived.

target: Le respondí que aún no habíamos decidido.
english: I replied that we hadn't decided yet.

target: Comentó que su madre había estado enferma esa semana.
english: He mentioned that his mother had been sick that week.

target: Me advirtió que tuviera cuidado con el hielo.
english: He warned me to be careful with the ice.
grammar: Advirtió que + subjunctive for indirect commands/warnings.

target: Dijo que se iba de vacaciones al día siguiente.
english: She said she was going on vacation the next day.
grammar: 'Mañana' becomes 'al día siguiente' in reported speech.

target: Me prometió que no volvería a llegar tarde.
english: He promised me he wouldn't be late again.

target: Le informaron de que su vuelo había sido cancelado.
english: They informed her that her flight had been cancelled.

target: Reconoció que se había equivocado.
english: He admitted he had been wrong.

target: Me sugirió que tomara el tren en vez del autobús.
english: He suggested I take the train instead of the bus.

target: Según la profesora, el examen sería más difícil que el anterior.
english: According to the teacher, the exam would be harder than the previous one.

target: Afirmó que nunca había visto algo así.
english: He stated he had never seen anything like that.

target: Me recordó que tenía que entregar el informe esa semana.
english: She reminded me I had to submit the report that week.
grammar: 'Esta semana' becomes 'esa semana' in reported speech (demonstrative shift).

target: Le pregunté si había estado alguna vez en Sudamérica.
english: I asked him if he had ever been to South America.

target: Insistió en que nos quedáramos a cenar.
english: She insisted we stay for dinner.

target: Dijeron que el problema se resolvería en unos días.
english: They said the problem would be resolved in a few days.

target: Me confesó que siempre había querido ser músico.
english: He confessed to me that he had always wanted to be a musician.

target: Nos comunicaron que las oficinas cerrarían a las tres.
english: They informed us that the offices would close at three.

target: Le pregunté por qué no había venido a la reunión.
english: I asked him why he hadn't come to the meeting.

target: Me contó que de pequeño quería ser astronauta.
english: He told me that as a child he wanted to be an astronaut.

target: Según los vecinos, el ruido venía del tercer piso.
english: According to the neighbors, the noise was coming from the third floor.

target: Le rogó que no le abandonara.
english: He begged her not to leave him.

target: Mencionó que su hermana acababa de tener un bebé.
english: She mentioned that her sister had just had a baby.

target: Me explicaron que el proceso tardaría varios meses.
english: They explained to me that the process would take several months.

target: Preguntó si podíamos enviarle los documentos por correo.
english: He asked if we could send him the documents by email.

target: Nos avisó de que habría retrasos en el servicio.
english: He warned us there would be delays in the service.

target: Dijo que lo pensaría y me daría una respuesta.
english: She said she would think about it and give me an answer.

target: Según mis padres, antes aquí todo era campo.
english: According to my parents, before, all this was countryside.

target: Le exigieron que presentara los documentos de inmediato.
english: They demanded he present the documents immediately.

target: Me aseguró que el paquete llegaría antes del viernes.
english: He assured me the package would arrive before Friday.

target: Comentaron que la obra del teatro había sido magnífica.
english: They commented that the theater play had been magnificent.

target: Negó que hubiera tenido algo que ver con el problema.
english: He denied having had anything to do with the problem.

target: Me recomendó que leyera ese libro cuanto antes.
english: She recommended I read that book as soon as possible.

target: Según el periódico, la economía mejoraría el próximo trimestre.
english: According to the newspaper, the economy would improve next quarter.

target: Le conté que había estado pensando en cambiar de carrera.
english: I told her I had been thinking about changing careers.

target: Me preguntaron si sabía dónde estaba la estación.
english: They asked me if I knew where the station was.

target: Nos dijeron que la cena estaría lista en media hora.
english: They told us dinner would be ready in half an hour.

target: Juró que no había tocado nada.
english: He swore he hadn't touched anything.

target: Según el médico, debería descansar al menos una semana.
english: According to the doctor, he should rest for at least a week.

target: Me dijo que aquella había sido la mejor decisión de su vida.
english: She told me that had been the best decision of her life.
grammar: 'Esa/esta' becomes 'aquella' in reported speech (distal demonstrative).

target: Le informé de que su solicitud había sido aprobada.
english: I informed him that his application had been approved.

target: Aseguró que no sabía nada del asunto.
english: He assured that he knew nothing about the matter.

target: Me reprochó que no le hubiera llamado antes.
english: She reproached me for not having called her sooner.

target: Cabe destacar que los resultados superaron las expectativas.
english: It is worth noting that the results exceeded expectations.
grammar: Cabe + infinitive = it is fitting/possible to (formal register).

target: De haber sabido las consecuencias, no habría aceptado.
english: Had I known the consequences, I would not have accepted.
grammar: De haber + participle = formal alternative to si hubiera + participle.

target: Habrá salido ya; siempre se va a esta hora.
english: He must have left already; he always leaves at this time.
grammar: Future tense for probability/conjecture about the present.

target: En virtud de lo expuesto, se solicita la aprobación del proyecto.
english: By virtue of the foregoing, approval of the project is requested.

target: Dicho esto, pasemos al siguiente punto del orden del día.
english: That said, let's move on to the next item on the agenda.

target: Habría unos doscientos invitados en la ceremonia.
english: There must have been about two hundred guests at the ceremony.
grammar: Conditional for conjecture about the past.

target: No bien hubo terminado de hablar, estalló un aplauso.
english: No sooner had he finished speaking than applause broke out.
grammar: Hubo + participle = pretérito anterior, very formal/literary.

target: Cabe señalar que esta medida beneficiará a miles de personas.
english: It should be noted that this measure will benefit thousands of people.

target: Será mejor que nos vayamos antes de que oscurezca.
english: It'll be better for us to leave before it gets dark.

target: En lo que respecta a la financiación, aún hay cuestiones pendientes.
english: With regard to financing, there are still outstanding issues.

target: De no ser por su intervención, el acuerdo habría fracasado.
english: Were it not for his intervention, the agreement would have failed.

target: Serán las cinco de la tarde, más o menos.
english: It must be about five in the afternoon.

target: A tenor de los resultados, cabe esperar mejoras significativas.
english: In light of the results, significant improvements can be expected.

target: Hubo de reconocer que su posición era insostenible.
english: He had to acknowledge that his position was unsustainable.

target: En lo sucesivo, las solicitudes deberán presentarse por escrito.
english: Henceforth, applications must be submitted in writing.

target: ¿Quién será a estas horas? Habrá pasado algo.
english: Who could it be at this hour? Something must have happened.

target: Cabe la posibilidad de que el evento se celebre al aire libre.
english: There is a possibility that the event will be held outdoors.

target: De haberse enterado antes, habríamos actuado de otra manera.
english: Had we found out earlier, we would have acted differently.

target: En aras de la transparencia, publicaremos todos los datos.
english: In the interest of transparency, we will publish all the data.

target: Tendría unos treinta años cuando empezó la empresa.
english: He must have been about thirty when he started the company.

target: Huelga decir que su contribución fue fundamental.
english: Needless to say, his contribution was fundamental.
grammar: Huelga decir que = needless to say (very formal register).

target: De no mediar circunstancias excepcionales, el plazo es inamovible.
english: Barring exceptional circumstances, the deadline is firm.

target: En lo tocante a la seguridad, se han tomado todas las medidas necesarias.
english: Regarding safety, all necessary measures have been taken.

target: Habrán sido las tres cuando llegamos al pueblo.
english: It must have been about three when we arrived at the town.

target: Cabe preguntarse si esta política es realmente efectiva.
english: One might ask whether this policy is truly effective.

target: De haberlo pensado mejor, no habría firmado el contrato.
english: Had I thought it over more carefully, I wouldn't have signed the contract.

target: A mi juicio, la propuesta carece de fundamento.
english: In my judgment, the proposal lacks foundation.

target: Estará cansado después de un viaje tan largo.
english: He must be tired after such a long trip.

target: Conviene recordar que las normas son de obligado cumplimiento.
english: It is worth remembering that the rules are mandatory.

target: De no resolverse pronto, el conflicto podría agravarse.
english: If not resolved soon, the conflict could worsen.

target: En resumidas cuentas, la inversión resultó rentable.
english: In short, the investment turned out to be profitable.

target: No habrá dormido nada con tanto ruido.
english: He can't have slept at all with so much noise.

target: A la luz de estos datos, debemos reconsiderar nuestra estrategia.
english: In light of this data, we must reconsider our strategy.

target: Una vez hubo concluido la ceremonia, los invitados pasaron al salón.
english: Once the ceremony had concluded, the guests moved to the hall.

target: Procede, pues, analizar las causas del problema.
english: It is therefore appropriate to analyze the causes of the problem.

target: Habría unas cincuenta personas en la sala.
english: There must have been about fifty people in the room.

target: Con arreglo a la normativa vigente, se procederá al archivo del expediente.
english: In accordance with current regulations, the file will be archived.

target: De no haber mediado su intervención, las consecuencias habrían sido graves.
english: Had he not intervened, the consequences would have been serious.

target: Valga como ejemplo el caso de las energías renovables.
english: The case of renewable energy serves as an example.

target: Dado el contexto actual, conviene actuar con prudencia.
english: Given the current context, it is advisable to act with caution.

target: Me costó un ojo de la cara.
english: It cost me an arm and a leg.

target: Está lloviendo a cántaros.
english: It's raining cats and dogs.

target: No me vengas con esas; dime la verdad.
english: Don't give me that; tell me the truth.

target: Meter la pata es algo que todos hacemos de vez en cuando.
english: Putting your foot in it is something we all do from time to time.
grammar: Meter la pata = to put one's foot in it (make a blunder).

target: Ese trabajo me tiene hasta las narices.
english: That job has me fed up to here.

target: No le des más vueltas; ya está decidido.
english: Don't overthink it; it's already decided.

target: Le echó una mano con las maletas.
english: He gave him a hand with the suitcases.

target: Quien mucho abarca, poco aprieta.
english: Jack of all trades, master of none.

target: Se quedó de piedra cuando se enteró de la noticia.
english: He was dumbfounded when he heard the news.

target: Eso es pan comido; lo termino en cinco minutos.
english: That's a piece of cake; I'll finish it in five minutes.
grammar: Pan comido = piece of cake (very easy).

target: No te andes con rodeos y dime qué quieres.
english: Don't beat around the bush and tell me what you want.

target: No me tomes el pelo; sé que no es verdad.
english: Don't pull my leg; I know it's not true.

target: Me quedé en blanco durante el examen.
english: My mind went blank during the exam.

target: Ese negocio fue viento en popa desde el principio.
english: That business went smoothly from the start.
grammar: Viento en popa = smooth sailing (literally: wind at the stern).

target: Estoy entre la espada y la pared.
english: I'm between a rock and a hard place.

target: Hablando del rey de Roma, ahí viene Juan.
english: Speak of the devil, here comes Juan.

target: Me pilló por sorpresa; no me lo esperaba para nada.
english: It caught me by surprise; I didn't expect it at all.

target: No pierdas la cabeza por una tontería así.
english: Don't lose your head over something so silly.

target: Aquí hay gato encerrado; algo no cuadra.
english: Something fishy is going on; something doesn't add up.
grammar: Hay gato encerrado = something fishy (literally: there's a locked-up cat).

target: Después de la tormenta, siempre sale el sol.
english: After the storm, the sun always comes out.

target: Me dejó plantado; esperé una hora y no vino.
english: He stood me up; I waited an hour and he didn't come.

target: Eso es harina de otro costal; no tiene nada que ver.
english: That's a different kettle of fish; it has nothing to do with it.

target: No hay que ahogarse en un vaso de agua.
english: You shouldn't make a mountain out of a molehill.

target: Me lo contó con pelos y señales.
english: He told me in great detail.

target: Tirar la toalla no es una opción.
english: Throwing in the towel is not an option.

target: Me lo pasé bomba en la fiesta de anoche.
english: I had a blast at last night's party.

target: No muerdas la mano que te da de comer.
english: Don't bite the hand that feeds you.

target: Le puso los puntos sobre las íes al nuevo empleado.
english: She set things straight with the new employee.

target: Ir al grano es lo mejor en una reunión de trabajo.
english: Getting to the point is best in a work meeting.
grammar: Ir al grano = to get to the point.

target: Ese chiquillo es un terremoto; no para ni un segundo.
english: That little kid is a whirlwind; he doesn't stop for a second.

target: Se le fue la lengua y contó el secreto.
english: He let it slip and told the secret.

target: Tener un as bajo la manga siempre es útil.
english: Having an ace up your sleeve is always useful.

target: No todo lo que brilla es oro.
english: All that glitters is not gold.

target: Se lo tomó a pecho y se enfadó muchísimo.
english: He took it to heart and got very angry.

target: Tuve que morder la lengua para no decir lo que pensaba.
english: I had to bite my tongue to not say what I was thinking.

target: Es un buen tipo, pero a veces se pasa de la raya.
english: He's a good guy, but sometimes he goes too far.

target: Me tienes en ascuas; dime qué pasó.
english: You're keeping me in suspense; tell me what happened.

target: Lo siento, metí la pata; no debí haber dicho eso.
english: I'm sorry, I put my foot in it; I shouldn't have said that.

target: Terminada la reunión, todos se dirigieron a la salida.
english: Once the meeting was over, everyone headed for the exit.
grammar: Absolute participial clause: participle + noun = 'once X was done'.

target: Lo que resulta difícil de entender es por qué nadie dijo nada antes.
english: What is hard to understand is why nobody said anything before.

target: Resueltos los problemas técnicos, se procedió a la inauguración del sistema.
english: Once the technical problems were resolved, the system inauguration proceeded.

target: Considerando que los plazos son ajustados, convendría empezar cuanto antes.
english: Considering that the deadlines are tight, it would be advisable to start as soon as possible.

target: El haber vivido en varios países le dio una perspectiva única.
english: Having lived in several countries gave him a unique perspective.
grammar: Nominalized infinitive: el + infinitive functions as a noun (subject).

target: Abierta la convocatoria, los candidatos disponen de treinta días para presentar su solicitud.
english: With the call for applications open, candidates have thirty days to submit their application.

target: No es sino trabajando todos juntos como lograremos superar esta crisis.
english: It is only by working all together that we will manage to overcome this crisis.
grammar: No es sino + gerund + como = it is only by... that (emphatic cleft).

target: Vistas las circunstancias, la dirección ha decidido aplazar el proyecto.
english: Given the circumstances, management has decided to postpone the project.

target: Lo difícil no es empezar, sino mantener la constancia a lo largo del tiempo.
english: The hard part isn't starting, but maintaining consistency over time.

target: Cuantos más obstáculos encontraba, más decidido estaba a conseguirlo.
english: The more obstacles he encountered, the more determined he was to achieve it.

target: Dicho lo cual, paso a presentar las conclusiones del estudio.
english: That being said, I will now present the conclusions of the study.

target: El que quiera entender la situación actual deberá remontarse a los orígenes del conflicto.
english: Anyone who wants to understand the current situation will have to go back to the origins of the conflict.

target: Llegados a este punto, no queda más remedio que tomar una decisión drástica.
english: Having reached this point, there's no choice but to make a drastic decision.
grammar: Llegados a este punto = absolute participial, 'having reached this point'.

target: No solo resulta costoso, sino que, además, requiere una infraestructura de la que carecemos.
english: Not only is it costly, but it also requires infrastructure that we lack.

target: Supuesto que todo vaya según lo previsto, la entrega se realizará en junio.
english: Assuming everything goes as planned, delivery will take place in June.

target: Lo cierto es que, pese a los esfuerzos realizados, los resultados han sido insuficientes.
english: The truth is that, despite the efforts made, the results have been insufficient.

target: Cumplidos los requisitos, se procederá a la evaluación de las candidaturas.
english: Once the requirements are met, the evaluation of candidacies will proceed.

target: No es tanto el qué se dice como el cómo se dice.
english: It's not so much what is said as how it is said.

target: Hechas las presentaciones, comenzó la negociación.
english: Once the introductions were made, the negotiation began.

target: Es precisamente por eso por lo que debemos actuar con cautela.
english: That is precisely why we must act with caution.
grammar: Es por eso por lo que = it's because of that that (cleft sentence).

target: Habiendo analizado todas las opciones, concluimos que la primera era la más viable.
english: Having analyzed all the options, we concluded that the first was the most viable.

target: Sea cual sea el resultado, lo importante es haberlo intentado.
english: Whatever the result may be, the important thing is having tried.

target: El no haber previsto este escenario nos ha puesto en una situación complicada.
english: Not having foreseen this scenario has put us in a complicated situation.

target: Sentados a la mesa, repasaron uno por uno los puntos del acuerdo.
english: Seated at the table, they reviewed the points of the agreement one by one.

target: Es mediante la educación como se transforman las sociedades.
english: It is through education that societies are transformed.

target: Cuanto mayor es la responsabilidad, mayor es la presión.
english: The greater the responsibility, the greater the pressure.

target: Analizada la situación, se optó por una estrategia más conservadora.
english: Once the situation was analyzed, a more conservative strategy was chosen.

target: Lo realmente preocupante no es el problema en sí, sino la falta de respuesta.
english: What is truly worrying is not the problem itself, but the lack of response.

target: Es solo cuando pierdes algo cuando te das cuenta de su valor.
english: It is only when you lose something that you realize its value.

target: Agotadas todas las vías de negociación, recurrieron a los tribunales.
english: Having exhausted all avenues of negotiation, they turned to the courts.

target: El saber escuchar es tan importante como el saber hablar.
english: Knowing how to listen is as important as knowing how to speak.

target: Puesto en contexto, el comentario no resultaba tan ofensivo.
english: Put in context, the comment wasn't so offensive.

target: No fue hasta que se lo explicaron tres veces que lo entendió.
english: It wasn't until they explained it to him three times that he understood.

target: Cuantas más personas participen, más enriquecedor será el debate.
english: The more people participate, the more enriching the debate will be.

target: Concluida la fase de pruebas, el producto se lanzará al mercado.
english: Once the testing phase is concluded, the product will be launched on the market.

target: Lo paradójico del asunto es que quienes más se quejan son quienes menos trabajan.
english: The paradox of the matter is that those who complain the most are those who work the least.

target: Fue en aquel preciso instante cuando comprendí que todo había cambiado.
english: It was at that precise moment that I understood everything had changed.

target: Yo cocino pasta los viernes.
english: I cook pasta on Fridays.

english: It's important that you study more.

english: I want you to come to my party.

target: No creo que llueva mañana.

target: No solo canta bien, sino que compone.
english: Not only does he sing well, but he composes.

target: Se encontraron restos arqueológicos en la zona.
english: Archaeological remains were found in the area.

target: Si hubiera más tiempo, visitaríamos el museo.
english: If there were more time, we'd visit the museum.

target: Sin embargo, prefiero quedarme en casa hoy.
english: However, I prefer to stay home today.

target: Fue publicado en una revista internacional.
english: It was published in an international journal.

target: A pesar del resultado, estamos orgullosos.
english: Despite the result, we are proud.

target: Ojalá lloviera un poco más.
english: I wish it would rain a bit more.

target: Si pudiera cocinar como mi madre, sería feliz.
english: If I could cook like my mom, I'd be happy.

target: Se cree que es la mejor opción.
english: It's believed to be the best option.

target: No solo estudia, sino que también trabaja.
english: Not only does he study, but he also works.

target: Como si nada hubiera pasado, sonrió.
english: As if nothing had happened, she smiled.

target: Llevo tres años viviendo en Madrid.
english: I've been living in Madrid for three years.

target: Acabo de terminar el informe.
english: I just finished the report.

target: Ella se puso a llorar de repente.
english: She suddenly started crying.

target: Dejé de fumar hace un año.
english: I quit smoking a year ago.

target: Volvió a llamarme por la noche.
english: He called me again at night.

target: Sigue lloviendo desde la mañana.
english: It's still raining since morning.

target: Dijo que vendría mañana por la tarde.
english: He said he'd come tomorrow afternoon.

target: Me preguntó si tenía hambre.
english: She asked me if I was hungry.

target: Me pidió que cerrara la puerta.
english: She asked me to close the door.

target: Explicó que el tren se había retrasado.
english: He explained the train had been delayed.

target: Cabe destacar su aporte a la ciencia.
english: It is worth noting his contribution to science.

target: Dicho esto, pasemos al siguiente tema.
english: That said, let's move to the next topic.

target: No parece que vaya a mejorar el tiempo esta semana.
english: It doesn't seem like the weather is going to improve this week.
grammar: No parece que + subjunctive for negated perception.

target: Dudo que alguien se haya dado cuenta del error.
english: I doubt anyone has noticed the mistake.

target: Es posible que tengamos que cambiar de planes.
english: It's possible that we'll have to change plans.

target: Aunque llueva, vamos a salir de todas formas.
english: Even if it rains, we're going out anyway.
grammar: Aunque + subjunctive for hypothetical concessions (even if).

target: Sea como sea, tenemos que tomar una decision.
english: However it may be, we have to make a decision.

target: Por mucho que insistas, no voy a cambiar de opinion.
english: No matter how much you insist, I'm not going to change my mind.
grammar: Por mucho que + subjunctive for futile emphasis.

target: A menos que me llames antes de las cinco, no espero.
english: Unless you call me before five, I'm not waiting.

target: Puede que tenga razon, pero no estoy de acuerdo.
english: He may be right, but I disagree.

target: Niego que eso sea verdad.
english: I deny that that is true.

target: Busco a alguien que sepa hablar tres idiomas.
english: I'm looking for someone who can speak three languages.
grammar: Subjunctive after indefinite antecedent: alguien que + subjunctive.

target: No conozco a nadie que haya estado en ese pais.
english: I don't know anyone who has been to that country.

target: Para que entiendas la situacion, te lo voy a explicar desde el principio.
english: So that you understand the situation, I'll explain it from the beginning.

target: Dondequiera que vayas, siempre te voy a recordar.
english: Wherever you go, I'll always remember you.

target: Es una lastima que no puedas venir a la fiesta.
english: It's a shame you can't come to the party.

target: No creo que haya suficiente tiempo para terminar.
english: I don't think there's enough time to finish.

target: Necesito un hotel que tenga piscina y este cerca del centro.
english: I need a hotel that has a pool and is close to the center.
grammar: Subjunctive after indefinite antecedent: un hotel que + subjunctive.

target: Dudo que el vuelo salga a tiempo con esta tormenta.
english: I doubt the flight will leave on time with this storm.

target: Aunque no hable el idioma, siempre me las arreglo cuando viajo.
english: Even if I don't speak the language, I always manage when I travel.

target: Es mejor que reserves con anticipacion para conseguir buen precio.
english: It's better that you book in advance to get a good price.

target: No parece que haya plazas disponibles en el tren de las diez.
english: It doesn't seem like there are seats available on the ten o'clock train.

target: Pase lo que pase, no pierdas el pasaporte.
english: Whatever happens, don't lose the passport.

target: Busco una ruta que no tenga demasiado trafico.
english: I'm looking for a route that doesn't have too much traffic.

target: A menos que encontremos un taxi, vamos a perder el avion.
english: Unless we find a taxi, we're going to miss the plane.

target: Es importante que los ninos aprendan a compartir desde pequenos.
english: It's important that children learn to share from a young age.

target: No creo que mi hermana sepa lo que le hemos preparado.
english: I don't think my sister knows what we've prepared for her.

target: Ojalá mis padres pudieran quedarse más tiempo.
english: I wish my parents could stay longer.

target: Aunque no estemos de acuerdo, es mi familia y la quiero.
english: Even if we don't agree, it's my family and I love them.

target: Quienquiera que haya hecho esa tarta, cocina de maravilla.
english: Whoever made that cake cooks wonderfully.

target: Antes de que los abuelos lleguen, vamos a preparar la casa.
english: Before the grandparents arrive, let's get the house ready.

target: Es posible que mi primo venga con toda su familia.
english: It's possible that my cousin is coming with his whole family.

target: No es que no me guste tu novio, es que apenas lo conozco.
english: It's not that I don't like your boyfriend, it's that I barely know him.

target: No creo que el proyecto este listo para la fecha limite.
english: I don't think the project will be ready by the deadline.

target: Es necesario que todos entreguen el informe antes del viernes.
english: It's necessary that everyone submit the report before Friday.

target: Aunque trabaje horas extra, no voy a poder terminarlo hoy.
english: Even if I work overtime, I won't be able to finish it today.

target: Dudo que nos aprueben el presupuesto sin mas datos.
english: I doubt they'll approve the budget without more data.

target: Es poco probable que cambien la politica de la empresa.
english: It's unlikely they'll change the company policy.

target: Necesitamos a alguien que domine las hojas de calculo.
english: We need someone who is proficient in spreadsheets.

target: Para que el equipo funcione, es esencial que haya buena comunicacion.
english: For the team to work, good communication is essential.

target: No niego que haya habido errores, pero estamos mejorando.
english: I don't deny there have been mistakes, but we're improving.

target: Hagan lo que hagan, no borren los archivos del servidor.
english: Whatever you do, don't delete the files from the server.

target: Por mas que revisemos los datos, siempre hay algo que se nos escapa.
english: No matter how much we review the data, there's always something we miss.
grammar: Por más que + subjunctive for emphasis on futility.

target: Llevo meses intentando encontrar un buen dentista.
english: I've been trying to find a good dentist for months.
grammar: Llevar + time + gerund = have been doing for [duration].

target: Se puso a cantar en medio del supermercado.
english: He started singing in the middle of the supermarket.

target: Estoy a punto de terminar el ultimo capitulo.
english: I'm about to finish the last chapter.
grammar: Estar a punto de + infinitive = to be about to do something.

target: Anda diciendo por ahi que se va a mudar.
english: He's going around saying he's going to move.

target: No deja de sorprenderme lo rapido que pasa el tiempo.
english: It never ceases to amaze me how fast time goes by.

target: Suele llegar tarde los lunes por el trafico.
english: He usually arrives late on Mondays because of traffic.
grammar: Soler + infinitive = to usually do something (habitual).

target: Ya lleva un rato esperando en la puerta.
english: He's been waiting at the door for a while now.

target: Volvio a equivocarse con la misma palabra.
english: He got the same word wrong again.

target: Acabamos de aterrizar y ya estamos haciendo cola.
english: We just landed and we're already waiting in line.

target: Llevo tres horas conduciendo sin parar.
english: I've been driving for three hours without stopping.

target: Se puso a llover justo cuando salimos del museo.
english: It started raining right when we left the museum.

target: Estamos a punto de perder el tren, date prisa.
english: We're about to miss the train, hurry up.

target: Sigo sin encontrar mi tarjeta de embarque.
english: I still can't find my boarding pass.
grammar: Seguir sin + infinitive = still haven't / still can't.

target: Suelen cerrar las tiendas a la hora de la siesta.
english: They usually close the shops at siesta time.

target: Dejamos de buscar hotel y decidimos acampar.
english: We stopped looking for a hotel and decided to camp.

target: Mi hijo lleva toda la manana jugando en el jardin.
english: My son has been playing in the garden all morning.

target: Acabo de hablar con mi madre y esta muy contenta.
english: I just spoke to my mother and she's very happy.

target: Mi abuela sigue tejiendo bufandas para toda la familia.
english: My grandmother keeps knitting scarves for the whole family.

target: El bebe esta a punto de dar sus primeros pasos.
english: The baby is about to take his first steps.

target: Mi hermano volvio a olvidarse del cumpleanos de mama.
english: My brother forgot Mom's birthday again.

target: Mis padres suelen cenar a las nueve de la noche.
english: My parents usually have dinner at nine in the evening.

target: Llevo dos semanas esperando una respuesta del cliente.
english: I've been waiting two weeks for a reply from the client.

target: Acabo de enviar el correo con los documentos adjuntos.
english: I just sent the email with the attached documents.

target: Se puso a gritar cuando vio los resultados trimestrales.
english: He started shouting when he saw the quarterly results.

target: Seguimos trabajando en la propuesta del nuevo proyecto.
english: We keep working on the proposal for the new project.

target: El jefe esta a punto de anunciar los cambios de departamento.
english: The boss is about to announce the department changes.

target: Dejo de responder correos a las seis para desconectar.
english: I stop answering emails at six to disconnect.

target: Suelo revisar el calendario a primera hora de la manana.
english: I usually check the calendar first thing in the morning.

target: Andan buscando un programador con experiencia en Python.
english: They're looking for a programmer with experience in Python.
grammar: Andar + gerund = to go around doing (ongoing search/activity).

target: Me dijo que no se encontraba bien y que preferia quedarse en casa.
english: He told me he wasn't feeling well and preferred to stay home.
grammar: Reported speech: present → imperfect (se encuentra → se encontraba).

target: Le pregunte si habia visto la pelicula y me dijo que no.
english: I asked him if he had seen the movie and he said no.

target: Nos comento que estaba pensando en cambiar de coche.
english: He mentioned he was thinking about changing cars.

target: Me aseguro que todo saldria bien al final.
english: He assured me that everything would work out in the end.

target: Dijo que habia intentado llamarme pero que no le contestaba.
english: He said he had tried to call me but I wasn't answering.

target: Le conte que ya no vivia en aquella ciudad.
english: I told him I no longer lived in that city.
grammar: Demonstrative shift: esta ciudad → aquella ciudad in reported speech.

target: Me advirtio que tuviera cuidado con la carretera de noche.
english: He warned me to be careful on the road at night.
grammar: Indirect command: advirtió que + imperfect subjunctive.

target: Segun ella, el restaurante era el mejor de la zona.
english: According to her, the restaurant was the best in the area.

target: Me prometio que la proxima vez vendria antes.
english: He promised me that next time he would come earlier.

target: Le explique que no podia quedarme porque tenia otro compromiso.
english: I explained to him that I couldn't stay because I had another engagement.

target: Reconocio que se habia equivocado al tomar esa decision.
english: He admitted he had been wrong to make that decision.

target: El guia nos dijo que el museo cerraba a las cinco.
english: The guide told us the museum closed at five.

target: Me informaron de que el vuelo se habia retrasado dos horas.
english: They informed me that the flight had been delayed two hours.

target: Nos recomendo que probaramos los tacos de ese puesto.
english: He recommended we try the tacos from that stall.

target: Preguntamos si habia habitaciones disponibles y nos dijeron que no.
english: We asked if there were rooms available and they told us no.

target: El taxista me conto que llevaba veinte anos conduciendo.
english: The taxi driver told me he'd been driving for twenty years.

target: Le dije al recepcionista que necesitaba una habitacion con vistas al mar.
english: I told the receptionist I needed a room with a sea view.

target: Segun el camarero, aquel plato era la especialidad de la casa.
english: According to the waiter, that dish was the house specialty.

target: Nos avisaron de que ibamos a llegar tarde si no saliamos ya.
english: They warned us we would arrive late if we didn't leave right away.

target: Mi madre me dijo que mi hermano habia llamado mientras estaba fuera.
english: My mother told me my brother had called while I was out.

target: Mi padre me pregunto si iba a llevar a los ninos al parque.
english: My father asked me if I was going to take the kids to the park.

target: Mi abuela siempre decia que la paciencia era la madre de la ciencia.
english: My grandmother always said that patience was the mother of science.

target: Me pidio que le comprara pan de camino a casa.
english: She asked me to buy bread on the way home.

target: Mi tia nos conto que de joven habia vivido en Argentina.
english: My aunt told us she had lived in Argentina when she was young.

target: Les prometi a mis hijos que iriamos al zoo el fin de semana.
english: I promised my children we would go to the zoo on the weekend.

target: La directora anuncio que habria cambios importantes en la empresa.
english: The director announced there would be important changes in the company.

target: Mi companero me comento que estaba buscando otro trabajo.
english: My colleague told me he was looking for another job.

target: El cliente nos dijo que no estaba satisfecho con el servicio.
english: The client told us he wasn't satisfied with the service.

target: Me informaron de que la reunion se habia adelantado al martes.
english: They informed me the meeting had been moved up to Tuesday.

target: Le sugerimos que revisara los numeros antes de presentarlos.
english: We suggested he review the numbers before presenting them.

target: El jefe nos pregunto si habiamos terminado el informe mensual.
english: The boss asked us if we had finished the monthly report.

target: Segun recursos humanos, las vacaciones empezaban el dia quince.
english: According to HR, the vacation started on the fifteenth.

target: Me pidio que le reenviara el correo con las cifras actualizadas.
english: She asked me to forward the email with the updated figures.

target: Cabe senalar que estos datos no han sido verificados.
english: It should be noted that this data has not been verified.
grammar: Cabe + infinitive = it is fitting/appropriate to (formal register).

target: De no haber sido por tu ayuda, no lo habria conseguido.
english: Had it not been for your help, I wouldn't have made it.
grammar: De no haber + participle: formal alternative to si no hubiera.

target: Seran las tres de la tarde, mas o menos.
english: It must be around three in the afternoon.
grammar: Future tense for probability/conjecture about the present.

target: Habra que esperar a que nos confirmen la fecha exacta.
english: It will be necessary to wait until they confirm the exact date for us.

target: Dicho esto, pasemos al siguiente punto del orden del dia.
english: That said, let's move on to the next item on the agenda.

target: Conviene recordar que no siempre fue asi.
english: It's worth remembering that it wasn't always like this.

target: No en vano se le considera uno de los mejores del pais.
english: Not for nothing is he considered one of the best in the country.

target: Habria que analizar el asunto con mas detenimiento.
english: The matter should be analyzed more carefully.
grammar: Habría que + infinitive = one should (impersonal, formal).

target: En lo que respecta a la calidad, no hay queja alguna.
english: As far as quality is concerned, there is no complaint whatsoever.

target: Bien es cierto que los resultados podrian haber sido mejores.
english: It is certainly true that the results could have been better.

target: Estara cansado despues de tantas horas de viaje.
english: He must be tired after so many hours of travel.

target: No seria descabellado pensar que hay otra explicacion.
english: It wouldn't be far-fetched to think there's another explanation.

target: Huelga decir que la puntualidad es fundamental.
english: It goes without saying that punctuality is essential.
grammar: Huelga decir que = it goes without saying that (very formal).

target: Cabe mencionar que la catedral data del siglo quince.
english: It's worth mentioning that the cathedral dates from the fifteenth century.

target: De haber llegado antes, habriamos conseguido mejores asientos.
english: Had we arrived earlier, we would have gotten better seats.

target: Tendran unos treinta grados en la costa esta semana.
english: It must be about thirty degrees on the coast this week.

target: Conviene senalar que el acceso al monumento es gratuito los domingos.
english: It's worth noting that access to the monument is free on Sundays.

target: Habra unas cien personas esperando en la cola del museo.
english: There must be about a hundred people waiting in line at the museum.

target: En lo que a gastronomia se refiere, la region es excepcional.
english: As far as gastronomy is concerned, the region is exceptional.

target: De no haber reservado con antelacion, nos habriamos quedado sin hotel.
english: Had we not booked in advance, we would have been left without a hotel.

target: Habra cumplido sesenta anos ya, si no me equivoco.
english: He must have turned sixty by now, if I'm not mistaken.

target: De haber sabido que venias, habria preparado mas comida.
english: Had I known you were coming, I would have prepared more food.

target: Bien es cierto que mi abuelo siempre tuvo razon en estas cosas.
english: It's certainly true that my grandfather was always right about these things.

target: Cabe destacar el esfuerzo que hizo toda la familia durante aquellos anos.
english: The effort the whole family made during those years is worth highlighting.

target: Sera la una; los ninos ya deberian estar en el colegio.
english: It must be one o'clock; the children should already be at school.

target: No seria justo que los demas carguen con toda la responsabilidad.
english: It wouldn't be fair for the others to bear all the responsibility.

target: Conviene que los mas pequenos se acuesten a una hora razonable.
english: It's advisable that the little ones go to bed at a reasonable time.

target: Cabe senalar que el presupuesto fue aprobado por unanimidad.
english: It should be noted that the budget was approved unanimously.

target: En lo que respecta al rendimiento del equipo, los datos son alentadores.
english: As far as team performance is concerned, the data is encouraging.

target: Habria que reconsiderar la estrategia antes de invertir mas recursos.
english: The strategy should be reconsidered before investing more resources.

target: De haber actuado antes, habriamos evitado estas perdidas.
english: Had we acted sooner, we would have avoided these losses.

target: Huelga decir que la confidencialidad es prioritaria en este asunto.
english: It goes without saying that confidentiality is a priority in this matter.

target: Dicho lo cual, pasamos a tratar el tema de la reestructuracion.
english: That being said, let's move on to the topic of restructuring.

target: Conviene tener en cuenta que los plazos son inamovibles.
english: It's important to keep in mind that the deadlines are non-negotiable.

target: No en vano ha sido el departamento con mejores resultados este trimestre.
english: Not for nothing has it been the department with the best results this quarter.

target: Sera conveniente que presentemos las cifras antes de la junta.
english: It would be advisable for us to present the figures before the board meeting.

target: De no mediar inconveniente, la firma se realizaria el jueves.
english: Barring any issues, the signing would take place on Thursday.
grammar: De no mediar = barring / if there are no (very formal legal/business register).

target: Eso me suena a chino.
english: That's all Greek to me.

target: No tiene ni pies ni cabeza lo que estas diciendo.
english: What you're saying makes no sense at all.
grammar: No tener ni pies ni cabeza = to make no sense (literally: no feet or head).

target: Le dio en el clavo con su analisis de la situacion.
english: He hit the nail on the head with his analysis of the situation.

target: No hay que darle mas vueltas; la decision esta tomada.
english: There's no point overthinking it; the decision is made.

target: Se me fue el santo al cielo y olvide la cita.
english: I completely forgot and missed the appointment.
grammar: Irse el santo al cielo = to completely forget what you were doing.

target: A palabras necias, oidos sordos.
english: Turn a deaf ear to foolish words.

target: Llueve sobre mojado; ya teniamos bastantes problemas.
english: It never rains but it pours; we already had enough problems.
grammar: Llover sobre mojado = when bad things pile up on existing problems.

target: Este sitio esta en el quinto pino; tardamos una hora en llegar.
english: This place is in the middle of nowhere; it took us an hour to get there.
grammar: Estar en el quinto pino = to be very far away / in the middle of nowhere.

target: Nos tomamos las vacaciones a pecho y no hicimos nada en todo el dia.
english: We took the vacation seriously and did nothing all day.

target: Fuimos con el agua al cuello para pillar el ultimo vuelo.
english: We were really pressed to catch the last flight.

target: El viaje fue pan comido; todo salio a las mil maravillas.
english: The trip was a piece of cake; everything went wonderfully.

target: Cuando vi las montanas me quede con la boca abierta.
english: When I saw the mountains I was left speechless.

target: Habia gato encerrado con la oferta del hotel tan barato.
english: There was something fishy about the hotel deal being so cheap.

target: Le echamos un ojo al mapa y nos pusimos en marcha.
english: We took a look at the map and set off.

target: De tal palo, tal astilla; el hijo es identico al padre.
english: Like father, like son; the son is identical to the father.
grammar: De tal palo, tal astilla = the apple doesn't fall far from the tree.

target: Mi hermana tiene mucha mano izquierda para resolver conflictos.
english: My sister is very tactful at resolving conflicts.

target: Aqui no se casa nadie; cada uno va a su bola.
english: Nobody commits here; everyone does their own thing.

target: Mi madre me echo un rapapolvo por llegar tarde a cenar.
english: My mother gave me a telling off for arriving late for dinner.

target: Eramos una y carne; haciamos todo juntas.
english: We were inseparable; we did everything together.

target: Mi primo siempre esta en las nubes; nunca se entera de nada.
english: My cousin always has his head in the clouds; he never knows what's going on.

target: El nuevo proyecto es coser y cantar si nos organizamos bien.
english: The new project is a breeze if we organize well.
grammar: Ser coser y cantar = to be very easy / a piece of cake.

target: Me pillo el toro y no pude entregar el informe a tiempo.
english: I got caught off guard and couldn't deliver the report on time.

target: Vamos a ir al grano y no perdamos mas el tiempo.
english: Let's get to the point and stop wasting time.

target: El jefe nos dio carta blanca para redisenar la pagina web.
english: The boss gave us carte blanche to redesign the website.

target: Se quedo de piedra cuando le dijeron que lo habian ascendido.
english: He was stunned when they told him he had been promoted.

target: No me ando con rodeos: necesitamos mas personal.
english: I don't beat around the bush: we need more staff.

target: Esa propuesta tiene mucha tela que cortar.
english: That proposal is a lot to unpack.
grammar: Tener tela que cortar = to have a lot to discuss / be complex.

target: Leido el comunicado, los periodistas empezaron a hacer preguntas.
english: Once the statement was read, the journalists started asking questions.
grammar: Absolute participial clause: participle + noun = 'once X was done'.

target: El haber crecido en un pueblo pequeno le dio una vision diferente de la vida.
english: Having grown up in a small town gave him a different view of life.
grammar: Nominalized infinitive: El haber + participle = 'Having done X'.

target: Fue precisamente alli donde descubri mi pasion por la pintura.
english: It was precisely there that I discovered my passion for painting.

target: Cuanta mas informacion teniamos, mas confusa se volvia la situacion.
english: The more information we had, the more confusing the situation became.
grammar: Comparative correlative: Cuanto más...más = the more...the more.

target: No es tanto lo que dijo como la forma en que lo dijo.
english: It's not so much what he said as the way he said it.

target: El que no arriesga no gana, o eso dicen.
english: Nothing ventured, nothing gained, or so they say.

target: Resulta dificil de creer que haya pasado tanto tiempo.
english: It's hard to believe that so much time has passed.

target: Lo que me sorprende no es el resultado sino el proceso que siguieron.
english: What surprises me isn't the result but the process they followed.

target: No fue sino despues de mucho pensarlo cuando tome la decision.
english: It wasn't until after thinking about it a lot that I made the decision.
grammar: Cleft sentence: No fue sino...cuando = It wasn't until...that.

target: Dichas las palabras de despedida, se dio media vuelta y se fue.
english: Once the farewell words were spoken, he turned around and left.

target: Lo importante no es ganar, sino saber perder con dignidad.
english: The important thing isn't winning, but knowing how to lose with dignity.

target: Sea cual sea la razon, no justifica lo que hizo.
english: Whatever the reason may be, it doesn't justify what he did.

target: Es en los momentos dificiles cuando se conoce a las personas de verdad.
english: It's in the difficult moments that you truly get to know people.

target: El no haber estudiado lo suficiente fue lo que le costo el examen.
english: Not having studied enough was what cost him the exam.

target: Cuanto menos se lo esperaba, mas sorprendido se quedo.
english: The less he expected it, the more surprised he was.

target: Recorridos los principales monumentos, decidimos explorar los barrios menos turisticos.
english: Having visited the main monuments, we decided to explore the less touristy neighborhoods.

target: Lo que mas me impresiono no fue la arquitectura sino la luz del atardecer.
english: What impressed me most wasn't the architecture but the evening light.

target: Fue alli, en aquel mercado, donde probe por primera vez la comida callejera.
english: It was there, in that market, where I tried street food for the first time.

target: Cuanto mas al sur ibamos, mas calor hacia.
english: The further south we went, the hotter it got.

target: El haber viajado tanto le permitio entender culturas muy diferentes.
english: Having traveled so much allowed him to understand very different cultures.

target: Una vez pasada la frontera, el paisaje cambio por completo.
english: Once the border was crossed, the landscape changed completely.

target: No es tanto la distancia lo que cansa como la espera en los aeropuertos.
english: It's not so much the distance that's tiring as the waiting in airports.

target: Fue en ese viaje donde aprendi que lo mejor es no planificar demasiado.
english: It was on that trip that I learned the best thing is not to plan too much.

target: Pasada la tormenta, los ninos salieron a jugar al jardin.
english: Once the storm passed, the children went out to play in the garden.

target: Lo que mis padres me ensenaron de pequeno es lo que me ha hecho quien soy.
english: What my parents taught me as a child is what made me who I am.

target: No fue hasta que tuve hijos cuando entendi de verdad a mis padres.
english: It wasn't until I had children that I truly understood my parents.

target: Cuantos mas anos pasan, mas se parecen los hermanos entre si.
english: The more years go by, the more the siblings resemble each other.

target: El haber crecido con tantos primos hizo que nunca me sintiera solo.
english: Having grown up with so many cousins meant I never felt alone.

target: Es en las reuniones familiares donde mas se nota la diferencia de generaciones.
english: It's at family gatherings where the generational difference is most noticeable.

target: Servida la cena, mi abuelo siempre contaba historias de su juventud.
english: Once dinner was served, my grandfather always told stories from his youth.

target: Sea lo que sea lo que decidan, los vamos a apoyar.
english: Whatever they decide, we're going to support them.

target: Analizado el problema, el equipo propuso tres soluciones posibles.
english: Having analyzed the problem, the team proposed three possible solutions.

target: Lo que diferencia a esta empresa de las demas es su cultura de innovacion.
english: What sets this company apart from the others is its culture of innovation.

target: No fue sino tras meses de negociacion cuando se firmo el acuerdo.
english: It wasn't until after months of negotiation that the agreement was signed.

target: Cuanto mas se invierte en formacion, mejores son los resultados a largo plazo.
english: The more you invest in training, the better the long-term results are.

target: El haber trabajado en equipo fue clave para el exito del proyecto.
english: Having worked as a team was key to the project's success.

target: Es en las situaciones de crisis donde se demuestra el verdadero liderazgo.
english: It's in crisis situations where true leadership is demonstrated.

target: Firmado el contrato, ambas partes se comprometieron a cumplir los plazos.
english: Once the contract was signed, both parties committed to meeting the deadlines.

target: No es tanto la cantidad de horas trabajadas como la productividad lo que cuenta.
english: It's not so much the number of hours worked as the productivity that counts.

target: Cuanto antes entreguemos el prototipo, antes recibiremos la financiacion.
english: The sooner we deliver the prototype, the sooner we'll receive the funding.

target: Lo dificil no fue encontrar el error sino convencer al equipo de que existia.
english: The hard part wasn't finding the error but convincing the team it existed.

target: El gato es negro.
english: The cat is black.

target: Eso es malo.
english: That is bad.

target: El tiempo es malo hoy.
english: The weather is bad today.

target: No es bueno ni malo.
english: It is neither good nor bad.

target: Estoy bien, gracias.
english: I am fine, thanks.
grammar: Estar for temporary states: how you feel right now.

target: Habla más despacio, por favor.
english: Speak more slowly, please.

target: Está bien.
english: It is fine. / OK.

target: Claro que sí.
english: Of course.

target: No sé.
english: I do not know.

target: Yo también.
english: Me too.

target: Feliz cumpleaños.
english: Happy birthday.

target: Bienvenido.
english: Welcome.

target: Salud.
english: Bless you. / Cheers.

target: Tranquilo.
english: Calm down. / Take it easy.

target: Exacto.
english: Exactly.

target: Cuidado.
english: Careful. / Watch out.

target: Mi color favorito es el amarillo.
english: My favorite color is yellow.

target: Las naranjas son de color naranja.
english: Oranges are orange in color.

target: Me gusta el color morado.
english: I like the color purple.

target: Las rosas son de color rosa.
english: Roses are pink.

target: El sofá es marrón.
english: The sofa is brown.

target: El cielo está gris hoy.
english: The sky is gray today.
grammar: Estar for temporary states: the sky is gray today (not always).

target: Necesito seis huevos.
english: I need six eggs.

target: Son las siete de la mañana.
english: It's seven in the morning.

target: Tengo ocho primos.
english: I have eight cousins.

target: Faltan nueve días para las vacaciones.
english: There are nine days until the vacation.

target: El miércoles tengo una cita.
english: On Wednesday I have an appointment.

target: Los jueves voy al gimnasio.
english: On Thursdays I go to the gym.

target: El sábado vamos al mercado.
english: On Saturday we go to the market.

target: Los domingos descanso en casa.
english: On Sundays I rest at home.

target: Marzo es un mes bonito.
english: March is a nice month.

target: En abril llueve mucho.
english: In April it rains a lot.

target: Mi cumpleaños es en mayo.
english: My birthday is in May.

target: En julio hace mucho calor.
english: In July it is very hot.

target: Agosto es el mes de vacaciones.
english: August is the vacation month.

target: En octubre empiezan las lluvias.
english: In October the rains start.

target: Noviembre es un mes tranquilo.
english: November is a quiet month.

target: En diciembre celebramos la Navidad.
english: In December we celebrate Christmas.

target: Está lloviendo.
english: It's raining.

target: Hace mucho sol hoy.
english: It's very sunny today.

target: Está nevando en la montaña.
english: It's snowing in the mountains.

target: Hace mucho viento.
english: It's very windy.

target: Esta calle es muy larga.
english: This street is very long.

target: La película es muy corta.
english: The movie is very short.

target: Esta flor es muy bonita.
english: This flower is very pretty.

target: Ese edificio es muy feo.
english: That building is very ugly.

target: El español no es difícil.
english: Spanish isn't difficult.

target: Este ejercicio es fácil.
english: This exercise is easy.

target: Levanta la mano.
english: Raise your hand.

target: Cierra los ojos.
english: Close your eyes.

target: Abre la boca.
english: Open your mouth.

target: Me duele el pie.
english: My foot hurts.

target: Me duele el brazo.
english: My arm hurts.

target: Me duele la pierna.
english: My leg hurts.

target: Tiene buen corazón.
english: He/she has a good heart.

target: Camino al trabajo todos los días.
english: I walk to work every day.

target: Corro por el parque.
english: I run in the park.

target: Quiero pan, por favor.
english: I want bread, please.

target: La leche está fría.
english: The milk is cold.

target: No como carne.
english: I don't eat meat.

target: La fruta está fresca.
english: The fruit is fresh.

target: Quiero una cerveza.
english: I want a beer.

target: Una copa de vino tinto.
english: A glass of red wine.

target: Comemos muchas verduras.
english: We eat a lot of vegetables.

target: La escuela está cerca de mi casa.
english: The school is near my house.

target: Necesito ir al hospital.
english: I need to go to the hospital.

target: Vamos al banco por la mañana.
english: We're going to the bank in the morning.

target: Me gusta ir a la playa.
english: I like going to the beach.

target: El aeropuerto está lejos del centro.
english: The airport is far from the center.

target: Estoy cansado.
english: I am tired.
grammar: Estar for temporary physical states.

target: Estoy contento.
english: I am happy.

target: Estoy triste.
english: I am sad.

target: Tengo miedo.
english: I am scared.

target: Estoy aburrido.
english: I am bored.

target: Estoy enfermo.
english: I am sick.

target: Estoy nervioso.
english: I am nervous.
